chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-2542 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For katcha peshi. For orders on M.A No.12207/15. 05-10-2017. None present on behalf of petitioner. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G = This petition was presented on 14.10.2015, since then no one has taken interest to proceed with this matter, which is indicative of the fact that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest to proceed with the matter. Consequently, this petition is dismissed in non prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Fahad Memon
